text:
Once upon a time, there was a tiny bluebird named Bluebell. Bluebell lived in a cozy burrow near a peaceful river. Every dawn, she would flap her wings and soar above the riverbanks, her small beak opening salAMIwed. Despite her small size, Bluebell was incredibly optimistic and had lots of adventures.

One sunny morning, while chasing a flock of curious juncos, Bluebell encountered a mysterious old owl perched on a cotton twig. With a flick of its feathers, the owl spoke.

"Ah, Bluebell! I've never seen such a spirited little bird."

Bluebell fluttered closer. "Hello! I'm Bluebell. What's so interesting about me?"

The old owl chuckled softly. "You're not ordinary. Have I ever met a bird like you?"

Bluebell perched on a branch, intrigued. "Do tell!"
